title: Tarpaulin Cover, Waterproof, Weatherproof, Frost-Resistant, UV Protection, Universal, Multipurpose, Groundsheet, Camping, Boating, Hiking (BLUE, 6 x 8 m)
features: ✔️Heavy-duty tarpaulin material for superior durability and weather resistance
✔️Reinforced edges and double-stitched seams for added strength and longevity
✔️Waterproof and UV-resistant coating for protection against the elements
✔️Blue Universal Tarpaulin - 50gsm; Silver Tarpaulin - Waterproof, 110gsm;Green Waterproof Tarpaulin - 90gsm; Transparent Tarpaulin - 160gsm
✔️Available in various sizes to suit different needs and applications
✔️Lightweight and easy to handle for convenience during setup and transportation
✔️Ideal for covering vehicles, equipment, woodpiles, and other items needing protection outdoors.
✔️Versatile use for outdoor camping, construction projects, gardening, and more
description: Product Description STRONG HEAVY DUTY WATERPROOF TARPAULIN Blue tarpaulin sheets 55 gsm BLUE STANDARD WATERPROOF TARPAULIN LOW BUDGET These Blue tarpaulin sheets are lightweight (50 gsm), They offer an effective covering for your usage. As they are lightweight, rot proof, mildew proof, shrink proof and very easy to handle covers, they can be used for a wide range of uses and are ideal for Gardening, DIY, camping, fishing, hunting, sledging, paint-balling, playgrounds, or anything that needs protection. They include eyelets to make tying down or hanging up quick and easy . They are recommended for temporary usage. Silver tarpaulin sheets 110 gsm SILVER HEAVY-DUTY WATERPROOF TARPAULIN Thick, high density polyethylene (110 gsm) Tear resistant structure Reinforced hem with sewn in polypropylene rope Rust proof eyelets UV resistant to prevent fading in sunlight Rot proof and mould resistant and suitable for year round use Incredibly sturdy yet lightweight (enough to carry with ease) Easy to fold and store after use Clear tarpaulin sheets 160 gsm CLEAR HEAVY-DUTY WATERPROOF TARPAULIN Thick, high density polyethylene (160 gsm). These rugged tarpaulins are manufactured from a high grade 160gsm material to provide longer life in tough conditions. Ideal for covering patios, concrete and brick courses. Green tarpaulin sheets 90 gsm GREEN HEAVY-DUTY WATERPROOF TARPAULIN Thick, high density polyethylene (90 gsm). Strong tarpaulin, reinforced with increased weight. Designed to cover and protect objects. Versatilely used in agriculture, construction, households. It will also work well as a waterproof underlay, for example, on a camping trip. Finished with a hemmed edge with additional reinforcement Has pressed-in aluminum fixing eyes at intervals of about 1 m
